description_long: This is a Canada Post mailbox, characterized by its bright red upper section and metallic gray lower base. The front face features a blue and white Canada Post logo strip above a horizontal mail slot, with a rectangular access panel below. The sides display the Canada Post emblem in white, with one side showing graffiti. The mailbox has a slanted top, likely to prevent water accumulation and discourage sitting. The structure appears robust, made primarily of metal, and is designed to be weather-resistant for outdoor urban environments. The overall appearance is functional, with clear branding and practical features for public mail collection.
description: A robust, red and gray Canada Post mailbox with a slanted top, front mail slot, and prominent postal branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue Canada Post logo strip, horizontal mail slot, and access panel below.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the Canada Post emblem and visible graffiti on the slanted top.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain red surface with no visible openings or branding.
description_view_3: Right side view with the Canada Post emblem, no graffiti, and the slanted top clearly visible.
attribute_mail_slot_location: centered on the front face near the top
attribute_collection_times_panel: rectangular panel below the mail slot on the front face, likely for collection times or information
attribute_postal_service_logo: blue and white Canada Post logo strip on the front, white Canada Post emblem on both side panels
attribute_door_or_access_panel: large rectangular access panel on the lower front face below the mail slot
attribute_posting_aperture_design: horizontal rectangular slot with straight edges
